name: summarize_idea
description: Create an AI summary of an idea or note. Use when user asks to summarize something.

parameters.name: idea_name
parameters.description: Name of idea/note to summarize (optional - uses current bubble if not specified)

name: list_summaries
description: List all ideas that have summaries. Use when user asks what has been summarized.

name: get_summary
description: Get the existing summary for an idea. Use when user asks to read a summary.

parameters.name: idea_name
parameters.description: Name of idea (optional - uses current if not specified)

name: generate_white_paper
description: Generate a structured document from linked ideas. Use when user wants a white paper or project overview.

parameters.name: start_node
parameters.description: Name of the idea/note to start from

parameters.name: task
parameters.description: Type of document: 'project overview', 'technical spec', 'requirements doc' (default: project overview)

parameters.name: max_depth
parameters.description: Maximum depth to traverse linked ideas (default: 5)

name: generate_project_structure
description: Convert whitepaper/notes into structured project with requirements and features. Use when user wants to turn ideas into a project spec or extract requirements.

parameters.name: bubble_name
parameters.description: Name of bubble to structure (optional - uses current)

parameters.name: create_nodes
parameters.description: Create canvas nodes for each feature (default: true)

name: generate_feature_docs
description: Generate detailed markdown documentation for each feature with user stories and acceptance criteria. Creates connected documents on canvas. Use when user wants feature documentation or detailed specs.

parameters.name: bubble_name
parameters.description: Name of bubble to document (optional - uses current)

parameters.name: include_requirements
parameters.description: Include linked requirements in docs (default: true)

parameters.name: connect_features
parameters.description: Create edges between related features (default: true)
